text.title: Router Shadow Deploy — Decision Tree
text.summary: Three-gate promotion: scoring delta + cost guardrail + schema parity. ALL green → promote; any red → fix or kill.

decision-tree.root-question: Has the shadow window run ≥7 calendar days with calibrated judge?

conclusion.verdict: EXTEND window OR re-calibrate judge; do not promote on a short or noisy signal
FIX schema sneak-change FIRST; do not promote with downstream-parser risk
NO-GO; investigate why candidate routes to expensive leg; fix and re-shadow

branch.question: Scoring delta median within acceptance-contract band?

conclusion.verdict: NO-GO; candidate is quality-regressing; investigate root cause
GO — proceed with gradual rollout (1% → 10% → 50% → 100%) with rollback flag wired

example.trace: window=7d + judge OK + schema=1.0 + cost=1.34 → cost gate FAILS
example.code: window_days=7 → judge_agreement=0.89 → schema_parity=1.0 → cost_delta=1.34 → r3-cost-guardrail verdict: NO-GO
